---
title: "Publications"
---

\* indicates equal contribution

**Mao, J.**, Choi, J.\* & Lê Cao, K.-A.\* (Accepted). Φ-Space ST: a platform-agnostic method to identify cell states in spatial transcriptomics studies. Cell Reports Methods. [[bioRxiv](https://www.biorxiv.org/content/10.1101/2025.02.05.636735v1); [Seminar recording](https://mixomics.org/2025/02/webinar-%cf%86-space-st-a-platform-agnostic-method-to-identify-cell-states-in-spatial-transcriptomics-studies/)]

Deng, Y., **Mao, J.**\*, Choi, J.\* & Lê Cao, K.-A.\* (2026). Scalable cell-specific coexpression networks for granular regulatory pattern discovery with NeighbourNet. [Genome Research](https://genome.cshlp.org/content/early/2026/03/26/gr.281171.125.abstract). \[Co-senior author\]

Liu, X.-Z., Panina, Y., Cai, W., Fernández-García, J., Peng-Winkler, Y., **Mao, J.**, … Fendt, S.-M. (2026). Targeting the lipid metabolism proteins FASN and GPAM in alveolar type II cells decreases lung metastasis. [Cancer Discovery](https://doi.org/10.1158/2159-8290.cd-25-0191).

Kuo, M., Lê Cao, K.-A., Kodikara, S.\*, **Mao, J.**\*, Sankaran, K.\* (2025). phylobar: an R package for multiresolution compositional barplots in omics studies. [Bioinformatics](https://academic.oup.com/bioinformatics/advance-article/doi/10.1093/bioinformatics/btag151/8540456?login=false). \[Co-senior author\]

**Mao, J.**, Deng, Y. & Lê Cao, K.-A. (2024). Φ-Space: Continuous phenotyping of single-cell multi-omics data. [Genome Biology](https://link.springer.com/article/10.1186/s13059-025-03755-8).


Zhang, X., **Mao, J.**\* & Lê Cao, K.-A.\* (2025). CellDiffusion: a generative model to annotate single-cell and spatial RNA-seq using bulk references. [bioRxiv](https://www.biorxiv.org/content/10.1101/2025.10.27.684671v1.abstract). \[Co-senior author\]

Kodikara, S.\*, **Mao, J.**\*, San Valentin, E. M. D., Do, K.-A., Reyes-Gibby, C. & Lê Cao, K.-A. (2025). Oral microbial signatures of head and neck cancer patients highlight diverse longitudinal patterns of oral mucositis severity. [bioRxiv](https://www.biorxiv.org/content/10.1101/2025.07.15.665024v1%7D%7B\emph%7BbioRxiv%7D%7D). \[Co-first author\]


Hesse S., **Mao J.**, Hadziahmetovic A., Offensperger F., Rojas Ringeling F., Monteagudo-Mesas P., Frauenstein A., Canzar S., Meissner F., Zimmer R., Lê Cao K.-A., Klein C. (Under Review). A molecular atlas of human granulopoiesis. \[[Under review at Nature Communications](https://www.researchsquare.com/article/rs-6184761/v1)\] [Atlas website](https://granulopoiesis.com/)


Camirand-Lemyre, F.\*, Delaigle, A.\* and **Mao, J.**\* (Under Review). Nonparametric regression esti- mation for streaming data. \[Under review at Biometrika. Author ranked alphabetically\]
